list.title: The FBI and other agencies paid informants
list.excerpt: The FBI and other agencies paid informants $548 million in recent years, with many committing authorized crimes.

list.title: Serial Killer Connections Through Cold Cases
list.excerpt: According to a new report from the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), about 40% of homicides in the U.S. went unsolved in 2017.

list.title: 33 Journalists Killed in 2025
list.excerpt: As of July 1, 2025, 33 journalists have been killed in 2025, with 26 of them killed while exposing the truth.

list.title: Muddy Waters Uncovers the Truth Behind Accounting Practices
list.excerpt: Blocks firm, Muddy Waters, is known for spotting fraudulent accounting practices, primarily at Chinese companies.

list.title: The SEC awarded whistleblowers $2.79 billion in 2023.
list.excerpt: The SEC awarded whistleblowers $2.79 billion in 2023. Protecting whistleblowers" privacy remains a top priority.

list.title: Former Deutsche Bank executive received $200M reward.
list.excerpt: A former Deutsche Bank executive helped regulators investigate benchmark rigging, receiving a record reward.
